runs.summary: Split high-value topics into standalone categories and added a much deeper FAQ expansion using mattress-specific search patterns.

categoriesAdded.name: Pillow Top Mattresses
categoriesAdded.description: Pillow top construction, feel, durability, shopper fit and comparison searches.

categoriesAdded.name: Euro Top Mattresses
categoriesAdded.description: Euro top construction, edge support, feel, durability and shopper-fit searches.

categoriesAdded.name: Fiberglass in Mattresses
categoriesAdded.description: Detection, labels, exposure, cleanup, alternatives and fiberglass-free mattress shopping.

categoriesAdded.name: Mattresses for Side Sleepers
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress firmness, pressure relief, materials and FAQs for side sleepers.

categoriesAdded.name: Mattresses for Back Sleepers
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress support, firmness, materials and FAQs for back sleepers.

categoriesAdded.name: Mattresses for Stomach Sleepers
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress support, firmness, materials and FAQs for stomach sleepers.

categoriesAdded.name: Mattresses for Combination Sleepers
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress responsiveness, firmness and FAQs for people who change positions.

categoriesAdded.name: Other Sleep Positions
categoriesAdded.description: Lower-confidence or less common sleep-position phrases retained for review.

categoriesAdded.name: Mattresses for Back Pain
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress-shopping questions for lower, upper, middle and general back pain.

categoriesAdded.name: Hip, Shoulder & Joint Pressure
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress firmness and pressure-relief questions for hips, shoulders and joints.

categoriesAdded.name: Sciatica, Numbness & Nerve Pressure
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress-shopping questions involving sciatica, numbness and radiating discomfort.

categoriesAdded.name: Health, Mobility & Accessibility
categoriesAdded.description: Mattress-shopping questions for mobility, reflux, apnea, allergies and accessibility.
